calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-24-2010 Continued To Nov-12-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-30-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

John Fitzpatrick Vannucci, Esq. for and with plaintiff Michael marcotte, was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by defendant Zhuo Biao Wu.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages - $222,626.00
Prejudgment Interest - 9,516.00
Costs - 449.00, for a total of $232,591.00

Judgment was submitted to and signed in open Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-26-2010 Continued To Oct-08-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
